    G

    Game - Class in scorefour.core
    The Game object manages the core logic of the game.
    Game() - Constructor for class scorefour.core.Game
    Constructs the Game object, initializes the required classes, and starts the game.
    GAME - Static variable in class scorefour.controller.AudioController
    The index of the game song.
    GameMode - Interface in scorefour.common
    A GameMode allows a program to be run in various ways.
    GameState - Enum Class in scorefour.common
    GameState allows the game to gracefully switch between various modes.
    getAudioController() - Method in class scorefour.controller.MenuController
     
    getAudioController() - Method in class scorefour.controller.PlayingController
     
    getColour() - Method in class scorefour.model.Bead
     
    getDebugFPS() - Method in class scorefour.core.Game
    debugFPS tracks the current frames per second the program is running.
    getGame() - Method in class scorefour.view.Panel

    A string which describes the use of the Command.

    getMenu() - Method in class scorefour.core.Game
    The MenuController handles all interactions, visuals, and logic of the games MENU state.
    GetMoveCommand - Class in scorefour.commands
    The GetMoveCommand allows the user to have the program propose a move.
    GetMoveCommand() - Constructor for class scorefour.commands.GetMoveCommand
     
    getPlaying() - Method in class scorefour.core.Game
    The PlayingController handles all interactions, visuals, and logic of the games PLAY state.
    getState() - Method in class scorefour.controller.ButtonController
    Returns the GameState passed to the button's constructor.
